texto: Well, I'm not sure where this puts me, Sire. I mean, at least with the others I know what's expected. I don't have to tiptoe around their sympathies, only their egos--for a short time." I grimaced. "No one is feeling sorry for me, but me. No one is asking me to feel things that...I do not wish to feel for them.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amie O'Brien sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Well, I'm not sure where this puts me, Sire. I mean, at least with the others I know what's expec…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, equality, inspirational-love, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspirational-love.

frase_original: Well, I'm not sure where this puts me, Sire. I mean, at least with the others I know what's expected. I don't have to tiptoe around their sympathies, only their egos--for a short time." I grimaced. "No one is feeling sorry for me, but me. No one is asking me to feel things that...I do not wish to feel for them.
